title: Frame Juice!
description: Fabric modpack designed to blend together performance and functionality while preserving all vanilla mechanics.
body:
Fabric modpack designed to blend together performance and functionality while preserving all vanilla mechanics.

It aims to increase FPS and reduce stuttering with performance mods that target rendering and server processing!

# **With the modpack!**
![With the modpack](https://i.ibb.co/VTJVTvS/moddedfj.png)
^ Consistent FPS and no lag spikes!

# **Without the modpack :(**
![Without the modpack](https://i.ibb.co/mz03y8z/vanillafj.png)
^ Inconsistent FPS and lots of stuttering...

# Issues
Please report any issues or suggest new additions here: [https://discord.gg/6mKwPDApe8](https://discord.gg/6mKwPDApe8)

I am happy to read all feedback!
